name: Gladly Customer Service Platform API
what_it_does: People-centric omnichannel customer service platform with REST API — organizing all customer interactions across email, chat, SMS, voice, social, and self-service around a single customer timeline (not tickets), enabling agents to see complete history, providing AI-powered sidekick, and delivering personalized service at scale for DTC and retail brands.
use_cases: Querying customer conversation history across all channels for CX analytics
Integrating Gladly customer data with ecommerce platforms for order context in conversations
Pulling agent performance metrics and CSAT data for customer service reporting
Automating conversation routing based on customer tier or order value via API
Syncing customer profiles between Gladly and CRM for unified customer view
not_for: B2B SaaS customer support with complex ticketing workflows (use Zendesk for B2B SaaS)
Developer-focused support with GitHub/Jira integration (use Linear or Zendesk)
High-volume transactional support without personalization (use Freshdesk for volume)
best_when: A DTC ecommerce or retail brand wants people-centric customer service where agents see complete customer history across all channels, with ecommerce platform integration for order context and AI assistance.
avoid_when: You're B2B SaaS, need complex ticket workflows, operate high-volume transactional support without personalization focus, or need deep Jira/GitHub developer integration.

auth.notes: API key from Gladly account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events across all channels. Shopify, Magento, Salesforce Commerce Cloud native integrations. No OAuth2.

pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2014. Raised $110M+ Series D. Backed by Greylock, GGV Capital, Bessemer. People-centric (not ticket-centric) differentiator — single customer timeline across all channels. Gladly Sidekick AI for agent assistance. High-revenue DTC brand focus (Bombas, Allbirds, Warby Parker customers). Premium pricing justified by NPS improvement and agent efficiency.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for customers, conversations, agents, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. People-centric data model: customer conversations (not tickets) require data model understanding. Ecommerce integrations configured separately. Webhook for all channel events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Customer reads fully idempotent. Conversation reads idempotent. Agent reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: People-centric data model: no 'tickets' — interactions organized by customer not issue
Ecommerce integrations (Shopify, Magento) configured in admin — not API-driven
Annual contract with premium pricing — validate before API integration
Voice channel requires telephony provider integration (BYOT — bring your own telephony)
Gladly Sidekick AI is platform feature — not API-accessible for custom AI

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Customer conversation data across all channels is sensitive PII — restrict API access. Ecommerce integration accesses order history and payment data — implement least privilege. Voice recordings require consent compliance.
